query: double exposure photograph overlapping ghostly silhouette portrait
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / double_exposure: ghostly overlapping portraits, multi-exposure

response.objective_caption: A black-and-white photograph of a person wearing dark sunglasses and a hooded sweatshirt, presented as a mounted print on a wall. Two overlapping, slightly offset versions of the same face create a mirrored, dual-image effect. The person has a neutral expression with closed lips, and the hood casts soft shadows around the face. Small bright reflections appear on the sunglasses lenses. A textured wall is visible around the edges of the mounted print, and a photographer credit appears in the bottom right corner.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black-and-white photograph using double exposure to create two overlapping, slightly offset versions of the same hooded face wearing dark sunglasses, producing a ghostly, mirrored dual-image effect. The muted, faded tonal range and gray monochrome palette contribute to an eerie, surreal atmosphere where the familiar self-portrait becomes uncanny and destabilized through the layered superimposition.
